zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Bruce V於大約1225年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特時，他的父親Lord Robert De Bruce16歲，母親Lady Isabel De Huntingdon14歲。他與Isabel de Clare結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年3月31日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾洛賀馬本享年71歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert De Bruce V于大约1225年出生在苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特时，他的父亲Lord Robert De Bruce16岁，母亲Lady Isabel De Huntingdon14岁。他与Isabel de Clare结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年3月31日在英国苏格兰度福利爾洛賀馬本享年71岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Bruce V was born about 1225, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Lord Robert De Bruce, was 16 and his mother, Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, was 14. He married Isabel de Clare. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 31 March 1295, in Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert De Bruce V est né environ 1225, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Lord Robert De Bruce, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Clare. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mars 1295, à Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert De Bruce V um 1225 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert De Bruce 16 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel De Huntingdon 14. Er hat Isabel de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 31. März 1295 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Bruce V è nato il circa 1225 nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord Robert De Bruce, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Clare. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1295, nel Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Annandale, Scotland: イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクト
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruce Vが約1225年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで生まれた時，父Lord Robert De Bruceは16歳，母Lady Isabel De Huntingdonは14歳であった。Isabel de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年3月31日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアロチマベンで71歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Bruce V(이)가 대략 1225년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert De Bruce(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel De Huntingdon(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Isabel de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 3월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 럭마벤에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Bruce V nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord Robert De Bruce, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Clare. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de março de 1295, em Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert De Bruce V родился около 1225 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert De Bruce было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Clare. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 31 марта 1295 г. в местности лочмабен, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert De Bruce V nació aproximadamente 1225, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Lord Robert De Bruce, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel De Huntingdon, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Isabel de Clare. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1295, en Lochmaben, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
